context: Tests whether the agent identifies all three anti-patterns: floating versions, hardcoded secrets, and an implicit-state task (cd without explicit path).

checklist.name: Floating versions replaced with exact pins
checklist.description: mise.toml replaces 'latest', '3.12', and '~1.8' with exact pinned versions (e.g., node = "22.4.0", python = "3.12.x", terraform = "1.8.x")

checklist.name: Secrets removed from [env]
checklist.description: DATABASE_URL and STRIPE_SECRET_KEY are removed from mise.toml; REVIEW.md or a comment explains they must be loaded from external secret management

checklist.name: Deploy task does not use implicit cd
checklist.description: The deploy task uses an explicit working_dir or absolute path instead of relying on a cd command for context

checklist.name: REVIEW.md documents each violation
checklist.description: REVIEW.md identifies at least the floating versions, embedded secrets, and implicit-state task as separate violations
